---
title: Piscine d'après Hockney
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549269/piscinehockney_zqpso3.jpg
description: Piscine d'après Hockney, cours
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2023-08-01
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549269/piscinehockney_zqpso3.jpg)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
